violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Any style eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. The consumer advisory shall have an indicating symbol telling the consumer which items are available raw or undercooked to their request. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2026

Cooked lobster meat was observed thawed in the 1-door reach-in cooler with its original intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food item was observed held at 38 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from its original packaging during the time of inspection. ROP thawing guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both prep units, and the 2-door low boy cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris as well as an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and/or food debris in the basement storage areas. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
